rationale: Both correctly identify the core established fact (PR #4834 intentionally made wake_up() raise after sleep(level=2), and the pre-existing test wasn't updated), matching yenuo26's thread comment. Both overreach beyond the thread by confidently declaring the fix already merged and recommending closure, when the actual thread shows Flink-ddd still requesting a full CI sleep-mode test run rather than confirming resolution. X is more thorough and grounded, citing more specific file/line evidence, adding useful runtime guidance (level-1 vs level-2 semantics, the companion admission guard) and reads as a genuine maintainer response; Y covers similar ground but in a more mechanical 'run report' format with less depth and slightly weaker grounding.
